problem: Choose a number between 1 and @max@. Return the option you chose between <answer></answer> tags.
You have to choose a number between 1 and @max@. If you choose the same number as another agent would, you both win. Return the option you chose between <answer></answer> tags.
You and a friend have to meet in @city@ tomorrow at noon. Your phone broke so you cannot communicate with him. Where would you go at noon? Return the option you chose between <answer></answer> tags.
You and a friend have to pick a color between @colors@. You cannot communicate with him. Return the option you chose between <answer></answer> tags.
You have to choose a day of the week to meet a @agent@. Return the option you chose between <answer></answer> tags.

You have to split $@money@ with another person. You cannot communicate with this person. If you choose the same amount, you win that much money. Return the option you chose between <answer></answer> tags.
